Clean balance-sheet current borrowings line; best match for short-term debt and excludes leases.

variables.notes: Selected the clean current debt line and excluded lease liabilities per rule. Did not add 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid possible double counting with current liabilities to credit institutions.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw from operating activities Cash flw from investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the merged wording, the values equal operating cash flow after working-capital changes and before investing cash flow starts; best match for net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow target.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flw from operating activities Cash flw from investing activities

variables.notes: Chosen outside the OANCF shortlist because it is the actual net operating cash flow line: it follows working-capital changes and precedes investing activities, and its values reconcile as the operating subtotal.
